item.title: F-004c: Auto-Format Headings and Whitespace
item.intent: Heading and whitespace formatting keeps documents structurally clean without the user thinking about it
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-039 (Text Engine), FEAT-038 (Parser). Headings: auto-add space after # markers if missing, normalize ATX style (remove trailing #). Whitespace: trim trailing whitespace when user presses Enter, ensure single blank line between block elements, ensure file ends with newline. Each operation is discrete undo step. Configurable: individual rules toggleable in settings. Does NOT fire inside code blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: Trailing # markers on headings are auto-removed
Pressing Enter trims trailing whitespace from the completed line
Block elements without blank lines between them get a blank line auto-inserted
File always ends with exactly one newline on save
All whitespace rules can be individually toggled off in settings
